operator: Operator can be used to change the program

programStatusInfo.onlyOnTeleskop: New program (Program only exists on Teleskop)
programStatusInfo.noChanges: Program is the same on both

printProgramDialog.selectMachine: Select a machine that wanted to print machine's programs
printProgramDialog.selectPrograms: Select programs that wanted to print
printProgramDialog.selectCommands: Select command that will be on print

changeNameDialog.enterNewName: Enter the new name of the program.

contextMenu.pasteDuplicateKeyWarning: Programs with given program numbers exists. Please provide a new program number for programs below.

deleteProgramDialog.warning: Program {name} will be deleted! Are you sure you want to continue?
deleteProgramDialog.deleteFromBoth: Delete program from both machine and Teleskop

send.fail: An error occured while sending program {name}.

get.fail: An error occured while taking program {name}.

delete.success: Deleting program {name} with program no {programNo} is succeed.
delete.fail: An error occured while deleting program {name} with program no {programNo}.

getInMachine.success: Taking program {name} in machine {machine} is succeed.
getInMachine.fail: An error occured while taking program {name} in machine {machine}.

copyAndSend.selectMachine: Select machines that you want to paste the programs.

deleteFromMultiMachine.selectMachine: Select machines that you want to delete the programs.

pasteNotification.success: Program {name} is successfully saved with program no {programNo}.

changeNameNotification.success: Change name operation is succeed for program with program no {programNo}.
changeNameNotification.fail: Change name operation is failed for program with program no {programNo}.

changeProcessTypeNotification.success: Change process type operation is succeed for program with program no {programNo}.
changeProcessTypeNotification.fail: Change process type operation is failed for program with program no {programNo}.

deleteFromMultiMachineNotification.success: Deleting program {name} with program no {programNo} from machine {machineId} is succeed.
deleteFromMultiMachineNotification.fail: An error occured while taking program {name} with program no {programNo} from machine {machineId}.

deleteVersionDialog.warning: Version(s) {code} will be deleted! Are you sure you want to continue?
